notes: Fully playable with good performance and Xbox controller functionality. Ambient wind noise seems overly loud and sometimes drowns out dialog; possibly a bug.
title: Super Cloudbuilt

notes: Game has audio issues that typically require installing xact to the prefix via winetricks, but doing so will cause the game to crash on startup. Playable otherwise.
title: Super Cloudbuilt

notes: wind sound is so loud, you can’t hear anything else; mouse lags if not run in full screen mode; >200fps with max settings; keyboard/mouse and xbox 360 gamepad work for playing
title: Super Cloudbuilt

notes: Game itself runs smooth, however LOUD wind sound makes game essentially have no sound since you'll be forced to silence the game. Was not able to find workaround, game crashes with xact installed via winetricks
title: Super Cloudbuilt

notes: sound is unplayably loud and must be turned off, voice only works to some extend but has extremely loud noise here and there (worse than before); Thanks to subtitles it can be played without sound; mouse lags if not run in full screen mode; >200fps with max settings; keyboard/mouse and xbox 360 gamepad work for playing
title: Super Cloudbuilt

notes: Same issue as before 3.16-5, except wind sound is now even louder and distorted. On the bright side, background music now plays where it previously did not.
title: Super Cloudbuilt

notes:
FAudio received  some fixes for this game; Music has some slight sizzling, but besides that sound is working now; The mouse issues in windowed mode are still there; I managed to get the sizzling to a point where I did not notice it any longer: Master Volume 75% 
SFX Volume 70% 
Music Volume 50% 
Voice-over Volume 100%
title: Super Cloudbuilt

notes: Audio issues appear to be fixed as of Proton 3.16-6. No additional bugs noted. Good performance and full controller support.
title: Super Cloudbuilt

title: Super Cloudbuilt
